/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION/RESTRPT:07-12-22/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULTPROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DOPU:ATTONEY AUTHORITY/

/X:THIS IS AN AMENDED SENTENCING ORDER AS OF 03-15-22/CAL:SENTENCING/IBARRA/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 1 Y:PJ 49 D/CTS:49/WS/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/RESTV/EMMOD:GPS MONITORING IS TERMINATED, COMMUNITY SERVICES IS ORDERED TO REMOVE THE GPS UNIT FORTHWITH,/X:THE SENTENCE AT COUNT 3 IS THE SAME AS THAT AT COUNT 1 AND SHALL RUN CONCURRENTLY WITH COUNT 1/CTORD:THE TERM OF PROBATION IS THE SAME FOR EACH COUNTAND SHALL RUN CONSECUTIVELY/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DOPU:ATTORNEYAPPEARANCE/

/CAL:PLEA SENT FROM DEPARTMENT 20/X:COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENSE MAKES AN ORALMOTION FOR A REDUCTION OF COUNTS 1AND 3 TO MISDEMEANORS,/MO GRTD/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1 AND 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:PAMELA HERZIG/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60//LDPX:02-14-22/ACM/X:DEFENDANT IS TO CHECK IN 3X PER WEEK/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TOCOMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSOCOMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/WS/X:DEFENDANT HAS A CURFEW AND IS TO REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE DURING THE FOLLOWINGHOURS 8PM TO 7AM/SA1:ANDREW SHANE HASTEDT,GWENDLYNN HASTEDT,JOHN CABRERA ROJAS AND GRACE AVERON/SAORD3/SAORD/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: TOSET PRELIMINARY HEARING (TE 4 HRS)/DOP/
